Suggestion on Project Topics: 1. The project proposal submitted by each group (4 to 8 students) must include a measurement system, which can be either analog or digital. 2. The sensor calibration is mandatory. 3. Students can incorporate suitable signal conditioning circuits, communication standards or display devices in the project work. They can evaluate the outputs and run necessary analytics on the data generated. 4. Sample projects: a. Implementation of a temperature transducer for low temperature measurement b. Wind measurement system using anemometers c. Vibration measurement using accelerometers
